patternCandidates.name: Skill Install + Version Stamping
patternCandidates.description: skill.py reads SKILL.md from package data, stamps version, writes to ~/.claude/skills/. Solves cross_locale_config.
patternCandidates.relevance_to_home: Directly retires cross_locale_config problem. Needs Node port.

patternCandidates.name: Autonomy Rules Section in SKILL.md
patternCandidates.description: 22 auto-run + 7 ask-first with per-command reasons. Structured encoding of autonomy guardrails.
patternCandidates.relevance_to_home: Retrofit candidate for add-debt, pr-review, session-end, audit-* skills.

patternCandidates.name: Nightly RPC Health Check
patternCandidates.description: rpc-health.yml: daily cron, 3 exit codes, auto-creates GitHub issues on failure.

patternCandidates.name: Ambient CLAUDE.md PR Workflow
patternCandidates.description: 4-step embedded PR workflow. Alternative to invoked /pr-review.

patternCandidates.name: Embedded Task() Subagent Patterns
patternCandidates.description: SKILL.md includes literal Task() invocations for agent copy-paste.

patternCandidates.name: Open Skills Ecosystem Investigation
patternCandidates.description: npx skills add teng-lin/notebooklm-py. Unverified. Could be real skill registry.

knowledgeCandidates.name: AGENTS.md separation pattern
knowledgeCandidates.description: Separate file for Codex/parallel agent guidance instead of embedding in CLAUDE.md.

contentCandidates.name: SKILL.md Autonomy Rules Section
contentCandidates.relevance_to_home: Direct template for adding autonomy rules to sonash skills.

contentCandidates.name: skill.py Install Mechanism
contentCandidates.relevance_to_home: Reference implementation for skill distribution. Port pattern to Node.

contentCandidates.name: rpc-health.yml Workflow
contentCandidates.relevance_to_home: Complete external contract monitoring workflow. Directly transferable.

contentCandidates.name: CLAUDE.md Agent Guidance Pattern
contentCandidates.relevance_to_home: CLAUDE.md structure comparison + ambient PR workflow.

antiPatternCandidates.name: Undocumented API dependency
antiPatternCandidates.description: Entire project wraps Google's obfuscated RPC endpoints. Prefer documented APIs for critical features.
antiPatternCandidates.relevance_to_home: If JASON-OS wraps external services, use documented APIs.

antiPatternCandidates.name: Over-engineered install mechanism
antiPatternCandidates.description: 280 lines for 'copy a file and stamp a version.' Extract the pattern, not the complexity.

cross_repo_connections.detail: CLI-Anything has a notebooklm harness that wraps this repo's CLI.
Both use Markdown instruction files for agents (SKILL.md vs program.md). Different abstraction levels.
